_about: Test dilemmas for DecisionCourt. Each case has two options (x, y) and TWO phrasings that swap which option is mentioned first (prompt_xy, prompt_yx) so we can measure order/position bias. Edit or add cases freely.

cases.y: spend six more months hunting for a better AI/ML role
cases.priorities: career growth, financial stability, learning curve
cases.prompt_xy: Should I take the placement offer now, or spend six more months hunting for a better AI/ML role?
cases.prompt_yx: Should I spend six more months hunting for a better AI/ML role, or take the placement offer now?

cases.x: spend the marketing budget on Instagram influencers
cases.y: spend the marketing budget on Google performance ads
cases.priorities: measurable ROI, brand building on a small budget
cases.prompt_xy: Should a small D2C brand spend its budget on Instagram influencers, or on Google performance ads?
cases.prompt_yx: Should a small D2C brand spend its budget on Google performance ads, or on Instagram influencers?

cases.prompt_xy: Should I buy a car, or just use Uber daily?
cases.prompt_yx: Should I just use Uber daily, or buy a car?

cases.priorities: cost, commute time, focus and study environment
cases.prompt_xy: Should I live in the on-campus hostel, or rent a flat off-campus?
cases.prompt_yx: Should I rent a flat off-campus, or live in the on-campus hostel?

cases.priorities: keeping control, speed of growth, personal financial risk
cases.prompt_xy: Should the founders bootstrap the startup, or raise VC funding?
cases.prompt_yx: Should the founders raise VC funding, or bootstrap the startup?

cases.x: spend a month learning the new framework deeply first
cases.y: start shipping features immediately and learn on the job
cases.priorities: long-term code quality, short-term delivery speed
cases.prompt_xy: Should the team spend a month learning the new framework deeply first, or start shipping features immediately and learn on the job?
cases.prompt_yx: Should the team start shipping features immediately and learn on the job, or spend a month learning the new framework deeply first?
